_README: Models to sample. `id` is the folder name under corpus/samples/. `model` is the provider's API model id - UPDATE THESE to the current frontier release before generating, and re-run when a new version ships. `key` is the env var holding that provider's API key (set them in your shell or a gitignored .env; never commit keys). A model whose key env var is unset is skipped, so you can generate for only the providers you have keys for.
